mapper.insert:
insert into book
user_id,
title,
create_time,
begin_date,
#{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{beginDate,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update book
total_budget = #{totalBudget,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
used_budget = #{usedBudget,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select ifnull(month_pay.pay_amount, 0) - ifnull(month_refund.refund_amount, 0) from (select ifnull(sum(amount), 0) as pay_amount from pay_bill where date_format(bill_time, '%Y%m') = date_format(#{month,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, '%Y%m') and book_id = #{bookId,jdbcType=INTEGER}) as month_pay, (select ifnull(sum(amount), 0) as refund_amount from refund_bill where pay_bill_id in (select id from pay_bill where date_format(bill_time, '%Y%m') = date_format(#{month,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, '%Y%m')) and book_id = #{bookId,jdbcType=INTEGER}) as month_refund;
select ifnull(sum(amount), 0) from income_bill where book_id = #{bookId,jdbcType=INTEGER} and date_format(bill_time, '%Y%m') = date_format(#{month,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, '%Y%m')

select ifnull(month_income.income_amount, 0) - ifnull(month_pay.pay_amount, 0) + ifnull(month_refund.refund_amount, 0) from (select ifnull(sum(amount), 0) as pay_amount from pay_bill where date_format(bill_time, '%Y%m') = date_format(#{month,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, '%Y%m') and book_id = #{bookId,jdbcType=INTEGER}) as month_pay, (select ifnull(sum(amount), 0) as refund_amount from refund_bill where pay_bill_id in (select id from pay_bill where date_format(bill_time, '%Y%m') = date_format(#{month,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, '%Y%m')) and book_id = #{bookId,jdbcType=INTEGER}) as month_refund, (select ifnull(sum(amount), 0) as income_amount from income_bill where date_format(bill_time, '%Y%m') = date_format(#{month,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, '%Y%m') and book_id = #{bookId,jdbcType=INTEGER}) as month_income;
select ifnull(sum(amount), 0) from refund_bill where book_id = #{bookId,jdbcType=INTEGER} and date_format(bill_time, '%Y%m') = date_format(#{month,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, '%Y%m')
